text: Why can't you just start the thing you know you need to do? Here's the part nobody tells you. You're not avoiding the work. You're avoiding the feeling the work gives you. The boredom, the anxiety, the fear it won't be good enough. Procrastination isn't laziness or bad planning. It's your brain doing something much sneakier. And it has a name.
